productDisplayName: Arrow Sport Men Check Blue Shorts
description: Composition Blue and red check shorts made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with insert pockets on the sides, a small coin pocket below the waistband on the right, patch pockets on the back with buttoned closures, comfortable waistband with belt loops, buttoned closure on the front and fold over hems with a buttoned flap Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash warm, inside out with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry inside out in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Fashionable elements such as checks and styling lends a stylish edge to these shorts from arrow. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team these with funny graphic t-shirts. Model statistics The product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
